text:
• Its own FTDC only - completely separate from mongod's FTDC.
/var/log/mongodb/
- diagnostic.data/
- metrics.2025-01-17.
- mongod's FTDC (mongod writes this)
metrics. interin
var/Log/mongotune,
liagnostic.data
- mongotune-metrics.0
- mongotune's FTDC (mongotune writes this)
- mongotune-metrics: inter im
FTDC Source
mongod's FTDC
mongotune's FTDC
Contains
Written By
serverstatus internals, WiredTiger stats, replication metrics
mongod
Policy metrics, CPU/memory from /proc, dwell times, rate limiter state, mongotune process stats, driver command latencies
mongotune
So for post-mortem analysis you'd look at both - mongod's view of itself, plus mongotune's external observations (including "how slow was mongod responding to my serverstatus calls").
